title: Kalyan Jewellers International Enterprises is Hiring: Floor Manager (Mid-Level)

jsonLd.title: Kalyan Jewellers International Enterprises is Hiring: Floor Manager (Mid-Level)
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with Kalyan Jewellers International Enterprises! We are hiring a Floor Manager for our Jabalpur team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About Kalyan Jewellers International Enterprises:
Kalyan Jewellers International Enterprises is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Coordinate with the supply chain team for timely stock delivery
• Maintain high standards of store hygiene and cleanliness
• Train and motivate the sales team to deliver excellent service
• Manage store operations to ensure smooth daily functioning
• Build relationships with regular customers to drive loyalty
• Conduct regular stock audits and prevent pilferage
• Manage shrinkage and reduce stock discrepancies

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Sc / M.Sc in Life Sciences
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Retail Operations
• Proficiency in Planogram
• Proficiency in Team Leadership
• Proficiency in Loyalty Programs
• Proficiency in Category Management
• Proficiency in Loss Prevention
• Proficiency in Visual Merchandising

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Referral bonus program
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Professional development and training programs
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Jabalpur, Madhya Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Kalyan Jewellers International Enterprises!
